chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Necessitates Discretionary Punishment, Legal Punishment, Stoning, Execution, and Exile in Adultery

text: 5044 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ جَمِيلٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "يُضْرَبُ عُنُقُهُ" أَوْ قَالَ "رَقَبَتُهُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5044 - In the narration of Jamil from Abu Abdullah (as), he said: "His neck is to be struck,"
Or Imam (as) said: "His throat."
